title: stelis restrepioides
intro: Stelis restrepioides, also known as the "Lace Orchid", is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis restrepioides include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
